title: enneapogon pubescens
intro: Enneapogon pubescens, commonly known as the hairy panic or hairy one-flowered panic, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Enneapogon pubescens include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for snake bites. Enneapogon pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is often combined with other plants in traditional remedies.
